codec.notes: MPEG-2 Long GOP, Fixed M=3 N=12, 50 Mbps 8-bit. Commercially known as XDCAM HD 422-50.

frame_rate.notes: 50i — 25 fps interlaced, 50 interlaced fields per second. Timecode embedded in MXF Timecode Track.

codec.notes: PCM uncompressed, BWF (Broadcast WAV) wrapper embedded in MXF

track_count.notes: 1 stream, up to 8 tracks. Ch1-2: programme audio (stereo). Ch3-4 (optional): M&E or Dolby E. Ch5-6 (optional): Audio Description premixed with programme audio. Unused tracks carry silence.

layout.notes: Follow EBU Recommendation R123 Audio Track Allocation for File Exchange. General audio in stereo; mono recorded phase-compatible on Ch1 and Ch2.

loudness.notes: Follow EBU R128 guidelines for loudness normalisation and permitted maximum level of audio signals.

subtitles.notes: RTÉ broadcasts closed captions in EBU .stl format. For English subtitles of foreign language programmes, subtitles must be burnt-in onscreen against a veiled background using Arial Regular font size 58px. Script and running order to subtitle@rte.ie at time of master file delivery.

metadata.notes: MXF Timecode Track required. File naming: MI + 9 digits (pre-assigned Media ID) + .mxf, e.g. MI000001234.mxf.

timeline.notes: Lineup tone at 09:58:00:00 (90 sec). EBU Bars (100/0/75/0 or 100/0/100/0) + countdown clock 09:59:30:00. Optional sync plop at 09:59:57:06–07: 2 frames peak white + 1 frame 1kHz tone on all tracks at -18 dBFS, audio within ±5 ms of video flash. Black at 09:59:57:08 to 10:00:00:00. Programme ends with freeze or living hold after end of part; fade/cut to silence by end of programme.

packaging.notes: Delivery via Aspera FASPEX. File named with pre-assigned RTÉ Media ID: MI + 9 digits + .mxf. One programme per file.

luminance.tolerance_note: EBU R103: RGB -5% to 105% (-35 to 735 mV); luminance -1% to 103%. Errors registered only where out-of-gamut signals exceed 1% of picture area.

video.notes: Digital video levels per ITU-R BT.709-5 Part 2. 8-bit system: black = 16, white = 235 (64/940 in 10-bit equivalent).

governance.source: RTÉ IPU Content Delivery Specification V1 March 20th 2026
governance.notes: RTÉ HD broadcast delivery. Video: MPEG-2 Long GOP (XDCAM HD 422-50), MXF OP1-a Closed/Complete, 1920x1080i/25, 4:2:2, BT.709, 8-bit limited (16–235), 50 Mbps. Audio: PCM 24-bit 48kHz BWF, up to 8 tracks (Ch1-2 programme stereo; Ch3-4 optional M&E or Dolby E; Ch5-6 optional AD premixed); EBU R128 -23 LUFS. Subtitles: EBU STL; foreign language content burnt-in Arial Regular 58px. Timecode: 10:00:00:00 start, MXF Timecode Track. PSE test required per ITU-R BT.1702. Delivery via Aspera FASPEX; filename: MI + 9-digit Media ID + .mxf.
